faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.paymentAnswer: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal. Payments are processed securely through Stripe.
faq.refundAnswer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with our service.
faq.cancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
